cnbc.title: Micron stock jumps 15% as soaring prices from memory crunch lead to quadrupling of revenue
cnbc.summary: Micron's quarterly earnings report follows a 700% surge in the memory maker's stock price over the past year.

cnbc.title: White House requests $87.6 billion supplemental spending for Iran war, farm aid
cnbc.summary: White House Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought asked House Speaker Mike Johnson for billions in extra spending for the Iran war.

cnbc.title: South Korea’s IPO bust clouds equity markets as Chaebol structure restrains listings
cnbc.summary: South Korea's IPO activity has lagged that of its regional peers as the structure of the market and governance reforms collide.

cnbc.title: Qualcomm stock pops 15% after chipmaker almost doubles projection for 2029 non-handset revenue
cnbc.summary: Qualcomm's primary business has been smartphones, which accounted for two-thirds of the company's product revenue in it's most recent quarter.

cnbc.title: Trump meets defense CEOs as Iran operations strain U.S. missile stockpiles
cnbc.summary: The White House is pressing major defense firms to expand missile and munitions output as Iran talks and weapons stockpile concerns put new pressure on the Pentagon’s industrial base.

cnbc.title: Trump cancels signing of bipartisan housing bill ahead of tense meeting with GOP senators
cnbc.summary: President Donald Trump abruptly canceled the signing of a bill aimed at increasing housing affordability an hour before he was due at the Capitol for the ceremony.

cnbc.title: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules
cnbc.summary: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.

cnbc.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of campaign to 'brazenly' and 'illicitly' extract AI capabilities
cnbc.summary: The letter, which was obtained by CNBC, claims Alibaba carried out "the largest known distillation attack on Anthropic to date."

cnbc.title: JPMorgan Chase unveils $50 billion buyback, Goldman Sachs raises dividend after Fed stress test
cnbc.summary: The announcements followed the release of the Federal Reserve's annual stress test, which found that all 32 large banks weathered a hypothetical recession.

cnbc.title: France suffers major power outage as Europe sizzles in record-breaking heat
cnbc.summary: A heat-related power outage left around 68,000 homes without electricity in western France as record-breaking heat sweeps Europe.
